title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at South Indian Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at South Indian Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
